description: Style Note With this T-shirt from adidas with Climacool fabric, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best. Product Details Black polo T-shirt, short sleeves, has a spread collar with two button placket, stripes along the collar, Adidas 3 stripes in gold appliqué d along the shoulders and sleeves, fabric taping on the collar inseam, branding on the left chest Material and Care 70% cotton and 30% polyester Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
